titleStmt.title: SII 27.257: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 257. (A.R. No. 155 of 1933-34.) AMMĀPĀḶAIYAM, SALEM TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in a street.

This record, which is said to be a copy of a copper-plate inscription, registers a gift of some lands at Ammāpāḷya and Nāramaṅgala, the cost of which was probably paid by Haidaralli into the treasury, to Akāvallāsāhēb for maintaining the daragah and the fakīrs.
The record is dated Śaka 1681, Pramādi, Āshāḍha śu. 8, the details being insufficient for verification. The tithi corresponds to 1759 A.D., July 2 when the week-day was Monday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tāṁbrada śāsanada
nakalu
svastiśrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaru
śaṁgaḷu 1681 saṁdu vartamānavāda pramādisaṁvatsa
rada Āṣāḍa śu 8 lu śrī madrājādhirāja rājapara
mēśvara prahuḍhapratāpa Apratimavīra narapati mahiśū
ra kriṣṇarāja vaḍeyaraiyyanavaru . Akāvallā sāhē
baravarige bareyisikoṭa tāṁbrada śāsanada kramaveṁteṁ
dare nīvu māḍuva phakīrara dharmmakke Avagū varu
nima da karu paḍustaḷada Aṁmāpāḷyada grāmavaṁdakke
huṭuvaḷi � 1 ga 300 . kāṭamanāyakana paṭa ga 86 . 0
Agi varigrāma ga 262 . nāmanāyakana paṭa ga 207 . ḥ
Aṁtu grāma 2 ke huṭuvaḷi �
varahāvu nāramaṁgaladagrā
ma vaṁdakke huṭuvaḷi ga 30090 Ubhayaṁ
grāma 1 kke huṭuvaḷi � pālicakra
ga 115593 kke saluva kraya gū
pāli ga 115539 ṁnnu haidaralli
bahadaranu bokasake vappistanāda kā
raṇa yi grāmagaḷannu nirapādhika vari
māṁnyavāgi daragāhada dharmakke maḍisi
yiruvadariṁdā nīvu mu da phakīraru
daragāhada dharmavanu śā
śvatavāgi Ācaṁ
drākkasthāyiThe rest of the record
Digital edition of SII 27.257 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
